% fig_lec08_naive_vs_lc.tex — Naïve (chart-component) transport vs Levi-Civita
% Data: generated by scripts/sim_lec07_lec08.jl
%
% Same curve C(t) and same initial v(0) = (0.3, 0.8) chart components.
% Two transport rules along C:
%   ∂-transport (naïve, chart-α): keep chart components constant;
%   ∇-transport (Levi-Civita):   solve  ċ^μ ∇_μ v = 0.
% At each sample t both vectors are drawn — they coincide at t=0 and
% diverge along the curve, illustrating that "parallel" depends on the
% choice of derivative operator.

\begin{center}
\begin{tikzpicture}
  \begin{axis}[
      width=10.0cm, height=6.2cm,
      view={-32}{34},
      xmin=-3, xmax=3, ymin=-3, ymax=3, zmin=-1.1, zmax=1.1,
      axis lines=none,
      xtick=\empty, ytick=\empty, ztick=\empty,
      clip=false,
  ]
    \addplot3[surf, opacity=0.30, shader=interp,
              colormap name=grsurface, mesh/rows=55, forget plot]
      table {data/lec07_surface.dat};

    % Curve C
    \addplot3[munsell, line width=1.3pt, no markers, forget plot]
      table {data/lec08_pt_curve_M.dat};

    % Levi-Civita transport (drawn first; banana, solid)
    \addplot3[
      quiver={u=\thisrowno{3}, v=\thisrowno{4}, w=\thisrowno{5}},
      -{Stealth[length=5pt, width=3.5pt]},
      banana!70!black, line width=1.1pt, no markers, forget plot,
    ] table[x index=0, y index=1, z index=2]
      {data/lec08_pt_vectors_lc.dat};

    % Naïve transport (chart-α partial): drawn over LC, dashed cgblue, slightly longer
    \addplot3[
      quiver={u=\thisrowno{3}, v=\thisrowno{4}, w=\thisrowno{5}},
      -{Stealth[length=4.5pt, width=3pt]},
      cgblue!85!black, line width=0.85pt, dashed, dash pattern=on 1.6pt off 1.0pt,
      no markers, forget plot,
    ] table[x index=0, y index=1, z index=2]
      {data/lec08_pt_vectors_naive.dat};

    % Endpoints
    \addplot3[only marks, mark=*, mark size=1.7pt, banana!90!black, forget plot]
      table {data/lec08_pt_endpoints.dat};

    \node[font=\sf\small, text=spacecadet]
      at (axis cs:-2.4,-2.8,1.0) {$\M$};
    \node[font=\scriptsize, text=banana!55!black, anchor=south west]
      at (axis cs:-0.80,1.95,0.55) {$\covd$-transport};
    \node[font=\scriptsize, text=cgblue!75!black, anchor=north]
      at (axis cs:0.95,0.40,-0.50) {$\partial$-transport};
    \node[font=\small, text=banana!60!black, anchor=north west]
      at (axis cs:1.80,-0.50,-0.10) {$p$};
    \node[font=\small, text=banana!60!black, anchor=north east]
      at (axis cs:-2.20,-0.50,-0.10) {$q$};
    \node[font=\scriptsize, text=munsell, anchor=west]
      at (axis cs:1.55,1.10,0.20) {$C$};
  \end{axis}
\end{tikzpicture}
\end{center}
